name: create_story
description: Create a new content story in a Storyblok space using the Management API. Requires a name, slug, and content object that matches a defined component schema. The story is created as a draft by default -- you must publish it separately if needed. You can also specify the parent folder, position, and tags. This endpoint requires a Management API token (not the CDN token).

parameters.name: space_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the Storyblok space.

parameters.name: story
parameters.description: The story object containing 'name' (display name), 'slug' (URL slug), 'content' (object with 'component' field matching a component name and content fields), and optionally 'parent_id' (numeric ID of parent folder), 'tag_list' (array of tags), 'is_startpage' (boolean).

parameters.name: publish
parameters.description: Set to 1 to immediately publish the story after creation. Defaults to 0 (draft).

body.text: This is the body of the new blog post.
This is the body of the new blog post.
